mapper.select: select * from pf_booking where member_id = #{memberId} and course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.insert: insert into pf_booking(course_id, member_id, member_name, status, create_time, update_time) values(#{courseId}, #{memberId}, #{memberName}, 'BOOKED', now(), now())
mapper.update: update pf_booking set status = 'CANCELLED', update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update pf_booking set status = 'SIGNED_IN', sign_in_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id}
